'''âr-w-sh''' ('''karawash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:momsplain|momsplain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:momsplain|momsplain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karawash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirawash|thirawash]] || [[word:jirawash|jirawash]] || [[word:shirawash|shirawash]] || [[word:kirawash|kirawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurawash|thuthurawash]] || [[word:jujurawash|jujurawash]] || [[word:shushurawash|shushurawash]] || [[word:kukurawash|kukurawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurawash|thurawash]] || [[word:jurawash|jurawash]] || [[word:shurawash|shurawash]] || [[word:kurawash|kurawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurawash|thurawash]] || [[word:jurawash|jurawash]] || [[word:shurawash|shurawash]] || [[word:kurawash|kurawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therawash|therawash]] || [[word:jerawash|jerawash]] || [[word:sherawash|sherawash]] || [[word:kerawash|kerawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorawash|thothorawash]] || [[word:jojorawash|jojorawash]] || [[word:shoshorawash|shoshorawash]] || [[word:kokorawash|kokorawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorawash|thorawash]] || [[word:jorawash|jorawash]] || [[word:shorawash|shorawash]] || [[word:korawash|korawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorawash|thorawash]] || [[word:jorawash|jorawash]] || [[word:shorawash|shorawash]] || [[word:korawash|korawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrawash|thĂŠrawash]] || [[word:jĂŠrawash|jĂŠrawash]] || [[word:shĂŠrawash|shĂŠrawash]] || [[word:kĂŠrawash|kĂŠrawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharawash|thatharawash]] || [[word:jajarawash|jajarawash]] || [[word:shasharawash|shasharawash]] || [[word:kakarawash|kakarawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharawash|tharawash]] || [[word:jarawash|jarawash]] || [[word:sharawash|sharawash]] || [[word:karawash|karawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharawash|tharawash]] || [[word:jarawash|jarawash]] || [[word:sharawash|sharawash]] || [[word:karawash|karawash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharawash|sharawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharawash|gosharawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharawash|gokisharawash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharawashnĂŒ|sharawashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharawashnknĂŒ|gosharawashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawashnĂŒ|gokisharawashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharawashĂ«|sharawashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharawashnkshĂ«|gosharawashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharawashĂ«|gokisharawashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawashro|sharawashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawashnkro|gosharawashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawashro|gokisharawashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawashmu|sharawashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawashnkmu|gosharawashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawashmu|gokisharawashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharawasher|sharawasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharawashnksher|gosharawashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharawasher|gokisharawasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharawashng|sharawashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharawashnkng|gosharawashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharawashng|gokisharawashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharawashya|sharawashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharawashnkya|gosharawashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharawashya|gokisharawashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharawashyam|sharawashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharawashnkyam|gosharawashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharawashyam|gokisharawashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawashnĂŒshĂ«|sharawashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawashnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharawashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawashnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharawashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawashnĂŒro|sharawashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawashnknĂŒro|gosharawashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawashnĂŒro|gokisharawashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawashnĂŒmu|sharawashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawashnknĂŒmu|gosharawashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawashnĂŒmu|gokisharawashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawashĂ«nĂŒ|sharawashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharawashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawashĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharawashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawashĂ«ro|sharawashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawashnkshĂ«ro|gosharawashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawashĂ«ro|gokisharawashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawashĂ«mu|sharawashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawashnkshĂ«mu|gosharawashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawashĂ«mu|gokisharawashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawashronĂŒ|sharawashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawashnkronĂŒ|gosharawashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawashronĂŒ|gokisharawashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawashroshĂ«|sharawashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawashnkroshĂ«|gosharawashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawashroshĂ«|gokisharawashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawashromu|sharawashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawashnkromu|gosharawashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawashromu|gokisharawashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawashmunĂŒ|sharawashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawashnkmunĂŒ|gosharawashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawashmunĂŒ|gokisharawashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawashmushĂ«|sharawashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawashnkmushĂ«|gosharawashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawashmushĂ«|gokisharawashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawashmuro|sharawashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawashnkmuro|gosharawashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawashmuro|gokisharawashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
